opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I just got over a terrible cold, and now I'm peeing pure blood and my side is cramping intensely.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Tonight my urine suddenly came out looking like straight blood with clots in it, and I've got this severe cramping pain in my side that keeps coming in waves — it's really frightening.

symptom_narrative.onset: the blood in the urine came on suddenly tonight; the cold started about three days ago and is nearly gone now
symptom_narrative.duration: a few hours of bloody urine tonight, with the pain coming in waves
symptom_narrative.character: the urine looks like pure blood with dark clots; the side pain is a severe gripping, cramping ache that comes and goes
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is severe when it comes in waves and I can't sit still; seeing the blood is terrifying
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the pain is in my side and around to my back; the blood is in my urine
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the pain comes in intense waves and eases between them; the bloody urine has been there since it started tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much helps; moving around and pacing during the cramps
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the cramps just come on their own in waves
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I had a heavy head cold for the last few days that's settling now; I've had visible blood in my urine a couple of times before but it never hurt like this
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've passed visibly bloody urine once or twice in the past, but those times were painless and settled on their own
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm pacing the room because of the cramping and I'm too anxious and uncomfortable to settle

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: my GP has told me before that there are traces of blood in my urine on the dipstick, even between the times I could see it
past_medical_history.how_managed: just kept an eye on with my GP

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I was told recently my blood pressure was a little bit up
past_medical_history.how_managed: nothing started yet, just to watch it

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: over-the-counter tablets I've been taking for the cold

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: young adult, works full time, lives with a housemate who is home tonight

objective_data_offered.value: my urine is bright red, like pure blood, and there are some dark clots in it
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: the patient's own visual description of the urine; no dipstick or laboratory test has been done

objective_data_offered.value: looks pale and sweaty, restless and pacing, clutching his side and grimacing during waves of pain
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: impression over a video call only; no measurement taken

objective_data_offered.value: I still feel like I'm passing urine okay, it's just very bloody
